resources.string: Space Crew
A ship management game
New Game
Recruit
Train
Medbay
Dismiss
Patrol (End Turn)
Deploy
Turn: %1$d / %2$d \nActions: %3$d / %4$d
SCORE: %1$04d
⚠ THREAT: %1$s [HP:%2$d ATK:%3$d]
Crew quarters are full.
Confirm Disband
Are you sure you want to dismiss %1$s? This is permanent.
Resolve Round
Return to Ship
COMBAT RESOLVED
COOLDOWN: %1$d rounds
%1$s has no available actions and waits.
\n\nMISSION FAILED — crew lost.
\n\nThreat neutralized!
%1$s negotiates a cease-fire — threat stands down!
%1$s attempted to negotiate — the threat presses on.
%1$s attempts to negotiate, but %2$s cannot be reasoned with!
%1$s projects authority. %2$s hesitates!
%1$s failed to intimidate %2$s.
%1$s projects authority, but %2$s is unaffected!
%1$s provides guidance. Ally\'s next attack deals +%2$d damage!
It is hard to coordinate against %1$s!
%1$s infiltrates enemy systems for %2$d damage.
%1$s attempts to hack, but %2$s has no systems to infiltrate!
%1$s patches up %2$s for %3$d HP.
%1$s identifies structural weaknesses in %2$s. %3$s gains a +%4$d damage bonus!
%1$s attempts to analyze patterns, but %2$s follows no detectable physical patterns!
%1$s takes evasive action — incoming damage reduced by %2$d.
%1$s attempts to evade, but it has no effect on %2$s!
%1$s catches the faction vessel by surprise with a high-speed ramming maneuver, inflicting %2$d damage!
%1$s outmaneuvers the pirate raider in a ramming strike for %2$d damage.
%1$s rams into the debris field! The ship takes heavy structural damage. %1$s and %2$s take 8 damage.
%1$s attempts to close in, but %2$s is not there!
%1$s uses high-G maneuvers to shake off the debris! Threat neutralized.
%1$s executes extreme maneuvers, tossing the boarding party around! Threat neutralized.
%1$s attempts extreme maneuvers, but the %2$s persists.
%1$s executes a high-G turn, but it has no tactical effect against %2$s.
%1$s unleashes heavy weapon fire on the pirate ship for %2$d massive damage!
%1$s targets the %2$s for %3$d damage.
%1$s\'s guns are useless against %2$s.
%1$s creates a kill zone! Defense vs boarding maximized at %2$d.
%1$s secures the deck, reducing incoming damage by %2$d.
%1$s attempts to fortify, but it offers no protection against %2$s.
%1$s engages in brutal close-quarters combat for %2$d damage, but takes %3$d in return!
%1$s firefights the hazard for %2$d damage, taking %3$d damage in the action.
%1$s charges, but has nothing to fight at close quarters against %2$s.
%1$s redirects power to shields — crew protected by %2$d.
%1$s tries to boost shields, but they are useless against %2$s!
%1$s overloads ship systems for %2$d damage.
%1$s tries to overload systems, but it has no effect on %2$s!
%1$s seals the bulkheads. The boarding party is trapped and skips their turn!
%1$s successfully isolates the hazard, neutralizing it!
%1$s fails to isolate the hazard.
%1$s attempts to isolate systems, but it has no effect on %2$s.
High chance to end conflict. [1 Round Cooldown]
Moderate chance vs Pirates. [1 Round Cooldown]
Ineffective vs %1$s. [1 Round Cooldown]
Can stun the target for 1 round. [2 Round Cooldown]
No effect on %1$s. [2 Round Cooldown]
Grants massive damage bonus to Ally.
Ineffective vs %1$s.
Standard damage vs electronic systems. [1 Round Cooldown]
No systems to hack on %1$s. [1 Round Cooldown]
Restores HP to the ally. [1 Round Cooldown]
Provides a damage bonus to ally\'s next action. [1 Round Cooldown]
Ineffective vs %1$s. [1 Round Cooldown]
Reduces damage from %1$s. [1 Round Cooldown]
Ineffective vs %1$s. [1 Round Cooldown]
Massive damage vs Factions. [2 Round Cooldown]
High damage vs Pirates. [2 Round Cooldown]
Unwise! Damages own crew. [2 Round Cooldown]
Cannot strike this target. [2 Round Cooldown]
Can instantly clear debris. [2 Round Cooldown]
Can neutralize boarding parties. [2 Round Cooldown]
No tactical effect vs %1$s. [2 Round Cooldown]
Very Effective vs Pirates. [1 Round Cooldown]
Standard damage. [1 Round Cooldown]
Ineffective vs %1$s. [1 Round Cooldown]
Excellent protection vs Boarders. [2 Round Cooldown]
No protection against ship hazards. [2 Round Cooldown]
General damage reduction. [2 Round Cooldown]
Lethal vs Boarders. High Self-Damage. [1 Round Cooldown]
Effective vs Hazards. Minor Self-Damage. [1 Round Cooldown]
No melee target found. [1 Round Cooldown]
Ineffective vs %1$s. [1 Round Cooldown]
Superior protection vs incoming fire. [1 Round Cooldown]
No effect on %1$s [1 Round Cooldown]
Standard structural damage. [1 Round Cooldown]
Stuns intruders for 1 round. [1 Round Cooldown]
High chance to neutralize hazard. [1 Round Cooldown]
Limited use against external threats. [1 Round Cooldown]
[ MISSION FAILED ]
[ MISSION COMPLETE ]
FINAL COMMAND SCORE: %1$04d
>> LOG SUMMARY:
TURNS SURVIVED: %1$d / %2$d
THREATS CLEARED: %1$d
TOTAL DMG TAKEN: %1$d
CREW LOST: %1$d
Select 2 Crew Members
Select exactly 2 members.
